extraction.text: FINDINGS:,1.  The patient's supine blood pressure was 153/88 with heart rate of 54 beats per minute.,2.  There was no significant change in heart rate or blood pressure on 80-degree tilt.,3.  No symptoms reported during the tilt study.,CONCLUSION: , Tilt table test is negative for any evidence of vasovagal, orthostasis or vasodepressor syndrome.
